summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IMFÆMOUS FREIGHT application. All specified features working correctly including homepage branding, user authentication, dashboard, rate calculator, analytics, loads page with filtering, premium services, and post load form security. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI fully operational.

Lane preferences API

Premium Services page shows 3 packages (7-Day Boost $29.99, 30-Day Boost $79.99, Verified Carrier Badge $149.99)
